claims.summary: `BridgeState::connectivity_status()` must report `Severed` when telemetry and sensory lanes are both disconnected.
Bridge reciprocity should classify stale telemetry with recent sensory as `bidirectional_stale_telemetry` rather than generic waiting.
`pressure_source_analysis_v1` should make dominant pressure-source synthesis inspectable before any safety decision trace relies on it.
